component.name: Codex Desktop
component.summary: Linux-native Agentic IDE wrapping the Codex CLI agent

description.p: Codex Desktop is a Linux-native, libadwaita-styled IDE that wraps the Codex CLI agent (and, optionally, Claude Code) behind a single GUI. The window is a GtkSourceView editor split with a virtualised chat pane that streams agent replies; a 3-process architecture (codex-desktop / codex-agent / codex-lspd) keeps editor crashes isolated from agent crashes.

ul.li: AdwApplicationWindow with collapsible sidebar, AdwTabView editor, GtkColumnView chat.
AgentBridge spawning the in-tree codex-agent over NDJSON JSON-RPC.
Append-only write-ahead log of agent events for crash recovery.
Markdown rendering of assistant replies via pulldown-cmark and Pango (no embedded webview).

description.p: Pre-release scaffolding: PR-A through PR-E. Not yet packaged for distribution.
